ddls:
CREATE TABLE "faculties" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty */,
  "faculty_name" TEXT /* Name of the faculty */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the faculty */,
  "faculty_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the faculty */,
  "faculty_head" TEXT /* Name of the head of the faculty */,
  "faculty_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the faculty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty that teaches the subject */,
  "subject_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the subject */,
  "subject_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_types" (
  "resource_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource type */,
  "resource_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource type (e.g., Lecture Notes, Sample Paper) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource type */,
  "resource_type_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the resource type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject the resource belongs to */,
  "resource_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource type */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the resource */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the resource */,
  "uploaded_on" TEXT /* Date the resource was uploaded */,
  "resource_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the resource */,
  "resource_format" TEXT /* Format of the resource (e.g., PDF, DOCX, PPTX) */,
  "resource_size" INTEGER /* Size of the resource in bytes */,
  "resource_last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_resource_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_type_id") REFERENCES resource_types ("resource_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upload event */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being uploaded */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member uploading the resource */,
  "uploaded_on" TEXT /* Date when the resource was uploaded */,
  "upload_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the upload */,
  "upload_status" TEXT /* Status of the upload (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uploads_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uploads_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculties ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student accessing the resource */,
  "accessed_on" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty the student belongs to */,
  "student_enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment for the student */,
  "student_graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected graduation date for the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculties ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty_members" (
  "faculty_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "faculty_member_name" TEXT /* Full name of the faculty member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the faculty member */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty the faculty member belongs to */,
  "faculty_member_designation" TEXT /* Designation of the faculty member */,
  "faculty_member_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience for the faculty member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_members_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculties ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the resource */,
  "uploaded_on" TEXT /* Date when the version was uploaded */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Author of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being tagged */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the category */,
  "category_parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_categories" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles_bridge" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
